title: Clonez
description:
A mod that adds player Cloning to Minecraft!
You can contact me in my official discord:
https://discord.gg/7Ks8cgVcxD if you have found a bug/ want to chat with the comunity
body:
**may not work in hardcore**
**Will not always work If Instant respawn isnt enabled!**
This mod changes how respawning works! You will need to make a clone materialiser, and an organ grower, First you get a Dna sample of the person we want to clone, insert it into the clone materialiser with a redstone core. Step 2 grow all organs in the organ grower, you do this by clicking the organ type you want and inserting a slime ball. step 3 insert all organs into the clone materialiser. once this is done the dead person can activate this or an alive person to come back from the dead!
You can contact me in my official discord:
https://discord.gg/7Ks8cgVcxD if you have found a bug! or want to chat with the community!
